features: 4K OLED evo technology with self-lit pixels for perfect contrast and 100% colour accuracy
Advanced α9 AI processor for stunning pictures and sound – Designed for and exclusive to LG OLED
Smart webOS platform with Freeview Play, Netflix, Disney+ and more, plus supreme connectivity
Ultra Slim Design – sharp profile, narrow bezels and premium stand
description: From the manufacturer See the Details of Every Light and Dark Powered by α9 AI Processor Gen8 Previous page The next-level brilliant alpha 9 AI Processor Gen8 Our processor's AI engine analyzes and upscales every frame in detail. By recognizing faces, it delivers not only 4K visual quality, but enhanced facial expressions and depth. Brighter visuals with Brightness Booster The alpha 9 AI Processor Gen8 and our new light boosting algorithm deliver brighter visuals. Experience Perfect Black OLED, only with LG OLED Perfect Black, even in bright or dark spaces. Perfect Black is UL-verified and delivers true black levels to enhance perceived brightness and contrast, whether it's bright or dark around you. Perfect Color 100% Color Volume and 100% Color Fidelity certified. Enjoy accurate, vibrant colors even in sunlight or dark environments. AI Picture Pro brings every frame to life AI Super Upscaling and OLED Dynamic Tone Mapping analyze each frame's elements to enhance resolution, brightness, depth, and clarity. Next page The next generation of LG AI TV Previous page AI Magic Remote featuring a dedicated AI button Control your TV easily with AI magic remote — no extra device needed! With a motion sensor and scroll wheel, point and click to use it like an air mouse or simply speak for voice commands. AI Search Ask your TV anything. Built-in AI recognizes your voice and swiftly provides personalized recommendations to your requests. You can also get additional results and solutions with Microsoft Copilot. AI Chatbot Interact with the AI Chatbot through your AI Magic Remote and address all concerns from configuring settings to troubleshooting. AI can understand user intent and will provide immediate solutions. AI Concierge One short press on the AI button on your remote opens up your AI Concierge which provides customized keywords and recommendations based on your search and watching history. Just say “Hi LG” to start interacting with your TV Your TV’s AI is always ready for your requests. Without even pressing a button, simply say “Hi LG”, it prompts the AI to start listening for your requests. Award-winning webOS Re:New Program The latest features and software with annual upgrades for 5 years. A CES Innovation Awardee for the cybersecurity category, feel safe knowing webOS keeps your privacy and data secure. Next page AI Voice ID LG AI Voice ID recognizes each user's unique voice signature and offers personalized recommendations the moment you speak. The video showcases the product in use. Dynamic Sound Booster powered by AI Processor AI processing enhances TV sound for a more powerful sound experience. Surround sound with virtual 11.1.2 channels Get the surround sound experience on your LG TV with AI's deep learning algorithms. WOW Orchestra, immersive sound by perfect synergy The perfect match, made to work harmoniously together to provide multi-surround sound environments. WOW Interface lets you control sound from your TV Next page 1 Al Voice Remastering 2 Dynamic Sound Booster 3 Virtual 11.1.2 channels 4 WOW Orchestra 5 WOW Interface Previous page Ultra Slim Design Your TV’s sleek frame redefines a modern look and makes viewing more immersive. Ultimate Gameplay Experience peak gaming with LG OLED C5. Get your game on without lag or motion blur. Best OLED TV for Movies Watch movies come to life in your home cinema through FILMMAKER MODE, Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos.
